creator: freebsd-2024@virtual-estates.net
text:
The new Siag (Scheme In A Grid) software sports quite "sexy"
	interface, which uses simply the  Xaw3d -- no heavy monsters
	like Qt or  GTk. Includes the siag  itself (spreadsheet), pw
	(Pathetic Writer  -- word processor) and  egon (an animation
	editor). Very usable on a P90 machine.

	My version of  port is quite different from the  old one, so
	please  forgive me  for providing  the complete  replacement
	rather patches.

Fix: New port's tarball is right here:
